patch.value: Remediate npm dependency vulnerabilities and stale direct dependencies

Upgrade the npm dependency graph to patched releases for 12 live Dependabot alerts: Vitest UI arbitrary file execution, Vite filesystem and websocket vulnerabilities, esbuild file disclosure, js-yaml alias DoS, picomatch method injection, flatted prototype pollution, and yaml deep-nesting stack overflow. Align package.json, package-lock.json, and bun.lock, then verify npm audit and release checks.

npm audit reports zero vulnerabilities.; Every currently open Dependabot alert resolves against the pushed lockfile.; Runtime and development dependencies remain compatible with supported Node versions.

value.author: codex
value.text: Live references: GitHub Dependabot alerts 3 5 6 8 9 10 12 14 15 17 18 and 20.

value.author: codex
value.text: Local remediation evidence: upgraded direct and transitive npm graph; npm audit --audit-level=low reports 0 vulnerabilities; package-lock.json and bun.lock are aligned.

value.author: codex
value.text: Vitest 4.1.10 pulls patched Vite 7.3.6,esbuild 0.28.1,picomatch 4.0.4,js-yaml 4.2.0,and flatted 3.4.2,closing the live advisory families together.
